zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Hawkwood Jr於1287年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr17歲，母親Domina Visconti12歲。他於大約1320年與Margaret Hedingham在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1340年7月18日之後在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆，埋葬在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Hawkwood Jr于1287年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr17岁，母亲Domina Visconti12岁。他于大约1320年与Margaret Hedingham在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1340年7月18日之后在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆，埋葬在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from some minor place named as ‘the hawk wood’, e.g. Hawkwoods in Sible Hedingham or Hawkwood’s Farm in Gosfield (both Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Hawkwood Jr was born in 1287, in Essex, England, his father, Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr, was 17 and his mother, Domina Visconti, was 12. He married Margaret Hedingham about 1320, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died after 18 July 1340, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, and was buried in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Hawkwood Jr est né en 1287, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Domina Visconti, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hedingham environ 1320, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après 18 juillet 1340, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Hawkwood Jr 1287 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr 17 und seine Mutter Domina Visconti 12. Er hat um 1320 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England Margaret Hedingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 18. Juli 1340 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England und wurde in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Hawkwood Jr è nato il nel 1287 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Domina Visconti, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hedingham circa 1320, nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 18 luglio 1340, nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, e fu sepolto a Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Hawkwood Jrが1287年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Srは17歳，母Domina Viscontiは12歳であった。約1320年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムでMargaret Hedinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年7月18日以後にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで死去し，イギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Hawkwood Jr(이)가 1287년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Domina Visconti(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 Margaret Hedingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 7월 18일 이후 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Hawkwood Jr nasceu em 1287, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Domina Visconti, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hedingham aproximadamente 1320, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu após 18 de julho de 1340, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Hawkwood Jr родился в 1287 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Hawkwood Sr было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Domina Visconti, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hedingham около 1320 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер после 18 июля 1340 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия.
